Host.description: The base URL for block preview requests.

Api.description: Relative path to the API endpoint that returns preview HTML.

ApiKey.description: API key used to authenticate preview requests.

Selector.description: CSS selector for where the preview should be injected.

Template.description: HTML template for rendering the block preview. Use {{html}} as a placeholder.

EnableOutputCaching.description: Caches the preview based on the received JSON for up to 24 hours. Can be RAM expensive.

Debug.description: Enables additional logging for debugging purposes.
